dsl_rule.translation_notes: Classic moving average crossover rule. Entry: price crosses MA from either direction (long above, short below). Exit: reversal crossover through the same MA. The 20-period MA is specified in parameters. crossover_confirmation_bars=0 means immediate confirmation on the bar of crossover. Direction is context-dependent as the signal generates both long and short entries based on direction of cross.

backtest_rule.reason: Classic moving average crossover rule. Entry: price crosses MA from either direction (long above, short below). Exit: reversal crossover through the same MA. The 20-period MA is specified in parameters. crossover_confirmation_bars=0 means immediate confirmation on the bar of crossover. Direction is context-dependent as the signal generates both long and short entries based on direction of cross.

source_rule_text: Generate trend-following signals by comparing price position relative to a moving average threshold; a single threshold creates mutually exclusive, non-ambiguous signals.
